The action of the millowners yes-
terday was offset by the district coun-
ell of the carpenters and millworkers
at last nights meeting. They APP
proved the boycott of the mills and
called upon all carpenters to observe
It, This means that no material from
these mills win be handled by them.


U1ess material can be obtained
from outside sources, some contracts
must be thrown up at once. If the
strikers extend the boycott 10 all the
mills. as is probable in few days,
the carpenters will all be forced to
quit and a general walkout Of all the
building laborers from all contracts
using building material from local
mills will result.
